title: Age of Creation
description: Age of Creation is a technical and adventure - focused modpack built around the Create mod? where you can build your own civilization and reshape the world through engineering
body:
Age of Mechanisms is a technical and adventure-focused modpack built around the Create mod, where you can build your own civilization and reshape the world through engineering.
Technology meets exploration — gears turn, steam rises, and every mechanism brings you closer to your own industrial revolution.
⚙️ Main Features:
Create and all major addons — from simple machines to fully automated production chains.
Build your civilization — expand settlements, develop infrastructure, and create a thriving industry.
Enhanced world generation — new biomes, landscapes, and structures make exploration truly rewarding.
Decorative mods — hundreds of blocks and items for detailed architecture and interior design.
Adventure spirit — discover new resources, dimensions, and engineering possibilities.
🧭 Step into the world of creation:
Start as a lone inventor and rise to become the founder of a great mechanical civilization.
Build, automate, explore — and prove that invention can change the world itself.
